app_context: A demo SaaS landing page and checkout flow for indie builders.

persona.label: Non-technical solo founder
persona.context: Needs to know if the tool can help before paying for another AI product.
biases: Gets anxious about unclear billing and hidden terms

task_outcomes.notes: Pricing was easy on desktop but hidden in the mobile layout.
After tapping the CTA, the page did not immediately confirm the tap.

issues.title: Mobile navigation hides pricing
steps_to_reproduce: Look for pricing from the top navigation
Try to compare plan cost before signup
issues.expected: Pricing should be reachable on mobile before signup.
issues.actual: The mobile header showed no pricing link or menu.
evidence: Pricing link visible on desktop, absent on mobile header
issues.tester_reaction: I would worry this is hiding the price until after I sign up.

issues.title: Signup button has no loading state
issues.confidence_rationale: Observed during mobile signup attempt, but not measured with lab tooling.
issues.expected: The button should immediately show that the tap was received.
issues.actual: The CTA looked unchanged for several seconds.
evidence: Observed no loading or disabled state after tap
issues.tester_reaction: I thought maybe my phone missed the tap.

overall_sentiment: I like the concept, but on mobile I felt less sure because pricing disappeared and signup felt unresponsive.
top_recommendations: Add pricing access to the mobile header.
Add immediate progress feedback to the primary CTA.
assumptions: The demo app is safe test data.
safety_notes: No payment or production action was attempted.
